coreIssue: This senior Frontend Engineer check-in is mainly about whether Nina’s recent high output is masking an unsustainable pace and reduced influence now that delivery pressure has eased.
openingQuestion: What is still creating the most load for you right now, and where would more visibility or backing from me make the biggest difference?
listenFor: whether she names a specific source of ongoing load now that the sprint has ended
whether if they minimize the late nights without giving a concrete example or time window
whether she points to a particular stakeholder, forum, or decision where her influence feels limited
avoid: do not praise the feature delivery in a way that normalizes the late nights as the standard for a senior engineer
do not jump straight into solutions before you know whether she wants air cover, priority tradeoffs, or more visibility
goodOutcome: You and Nina have agreed one realistic set of priorities for the next two weeks and one concrete way you will increase her visibility or decision influence as a senior Frontend Engineer.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one example of her recent delivery you can reference, then separate your questions into two parts: sustainability now and where she wants more visibility or backing.
